name: one-agent
description: 模型无关、可靠性优先的轻量 Agent Runtime

scripts.dev: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter trace-web build && concurrently -n trace,cli -c cyan,green "node apps/trace-web/dist/index.js" "pnpm --filter cli dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:eval && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter cli build && pnpm --filter trace-web build
scripts.test: pnpm build:eval && pnpm --filter agent-core test && pnpm --filter agent-eval test && pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter cli test && pnpm --filter trace-web test
